title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the "Chief Zeb Smith Post Office".
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
plain_summary: This bill renames a post office building in Fritch, Texas to honor someone named Chief Zeb Smith. The post office is located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue. From now on, all official government papers will call this building the Chief Zeb Smith Post Office instead of its old name.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

sections.title: Section 1 Chief Zeb Smith Post Office
sections.text: The United States Postal Service building located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, will be officially named the Chief Zeb Smith Post Office. Whenever any law, map, rule, document, paper, or other government record mentions this postal facility, it must use the name Chief Zeb Smith Post Office.
